name: Knowledge Base Contribution
about: Add new agricultural documents to ICAR knowledge base
title: '[KB] '
labels: knowledge-base
assignees: ''
---

## Document Details

Crop: e.g. Rice, Wheat, Cotton
Disease or Topic: e.g. Rice Blast, Soil Management
Language: English / Hindi / Both
Source: e.g. ICAR-CRRI Technical Bulletin 2023

## Document Content
Paste document content or attach PDF.

## Verification
- [ ] Content is from verified ICAR/KVK/government source
- [ ] No copyrighted content
- [ ] Actionable advice for farmers
- [ ] Reviewed by agricultural expert if possible
